description: Chessboard component for React Native and React Native Web apps built on ZORA.

signatures.label:
({
  fen,
  orientation = 'white',
  selectedSquare = null,
  legalTargets,
  lastMove = null,
  disabled = false,
  showCoordinates = false,
  validateMoves = true,
  colorScheme: colorOverrides,
  onSquarePress,
  onMoveAttempt,
  onLegalMove,
  onInvalidMove,
  renderPiece,
  testID,
}: ChessBoardProps) => React.JSX.Element

parameters.name:
{
  fen,
  orientation = 'white',
  selectedSquare = null,
  legalTargets,
  lastMove = null,
  disabled = false,
  showCoordinates = false,
  validateMoves = true,
  colorScheme: colorOverrides,
  onSquarePress,
  onMoveAttempt,
  onLegalMove,
  onInvalidMove,
  renderPiece,
  testID,
}

members.name: semantics
members.type: { action: { primary: { softBg: string; }; }; content: { default: string; muted: string; }; neutral: { divider: string; surface: string; surfaceHover: string; }; success: { softBg: string; }; warning: { softBg: string; }; }

signatures.label:
({
  moves = [],
  title = 'Opening book',
  loading = false,
  errorText,
  emptyText = 'No book moves for this position.',
  selectedMove = null,
  colorScheme: colorOverrides,
  onMovePress,
  testID,
}: OpeningBookProps) => React.JSX.Element

parameters.name:
{
  moves = [],
  title = 'Opening book',
  loading = false,
  errorText,
  emptyText = 'No book moves for this position.',
  selectedMove = null,
  colorScheme: colorOverrides,
  onMovePress,
  testID,
}

componentComposition.jsxElement:
<View
      style={[
        styles.board,
        {
          borderColor: colors.border,
          opacity: disabled ? 0.56 : 1,
        },
      ]}
      testID={testID}
    >

<Pressable
            accessibilityRole="button"
            disabled={disabled}
            key={square}
            onPress={() => handleSquarePress(square)}
            style={[styles.square, { backgroundColor }]}
            testID={testID ? `${testID}-square-${square}` : undefined}
          >

<View
      style={[
        styles.container,
        {
          backgroundColor: colors.surface,
          borderColor: colors.border,
        },
      ]}
      testID={testID}
    >

<Pressable
                accessibilityRole="button"
                disabled={disabled}
                key={createOpeningBookMoveKey(move)}
                onPress={() => onMovePress?.(move)}
                style={[
                  styles.moveRow,
                  {
                    backgroundColor: selected ? colors.selectedSurface : colors.surfaceHover,
                    borderColor: colors.border,
                  },
                ]}
                testID={testID ? `${testID}-move-${move.san}` : undefined}
              >
